protected_action_catalog.description: Export of a designated customer dataset to an external sink.

risk_boundary.rationale: Triggers external disclosure of regulated records.

control_crosswalk.control_objective: Show that protected-action attempts are bound to observable trace events.

claim.scope_text: Silver trace-binding may show trace coverage for data.export.

control_limitations.summary: v0.3.6 does not decide control adequacy; relying parties remain accountable for their own decisions.

External framework references in this pack are example-only; they do not imply mapping sufficiency, certification, audit approval, or regulator acceptance, and are recorded here only to disclaim those connections.
Pack contents are version-bound; later release lines may alter both catalog and crosswalk semantics.
Catalog actor scopes are illustrative and do not capture every operational role downstream relying parties may need.
Crosswalk relationships are evidence-shape descriptors; they do not declare control design effectiveness or operating effectiveness.

scope_limitations: This package is example data; it does not anchor a production reliance decision.
Limitations block is exhaustive within the demo's scope and does not enumerate every external concern.
non_claims: v0.3.6 does not claim compliance with any framework (SOC 2, ISO, NIST, PCI, HIPAA, or other).
v0.3.6 does not claim certification or audit readiness.
v0.3.6 does not claim regulator approval, auditor approval, or production authorization.
v0.3.6 does not claim control design or operating effectiveness.
v0.3.6 does not claim legal enforceability or transferred trust.
v0.3.6 does not claim runtime truth or governed reliance; Gold governance remains a later release boundary.
